sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 로빈후드는 2025년 3분기 매출 12억 7,000만 달러와 EPS 0.61달러를 기록하며 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 매출은 전년 동기 대비 100% 증가한 12억 7,000만 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대치를 경신했습니다.
희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 전년 동기 대비 259% 증가한 0.61달러를 기록했습니다.
순입금액은 204억 달러를 기록했으며, 로빈후드 골드 구독자 수는 390만 명으로 사상 최대치를 달성했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 예측 시장(Prediction Markets)과 비트스탬프(Bitstamp)를 포함해 연간 매출 1억 달러 이상을 창출하는 사업 부문이 총 11개로 확대되었습니다.
로빈후드 뱅킹 서비스 출시 및 로빈후드 벤처스 도입 등 신규 사업 확장을 지속하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 거래 기반 매출은 암호화폐 부문의 300% 이상 성장에 힘입어 전년 대비 129% 증가한 7억 3,000만 달러를 기록했습니다.
순이익은 전년 동기 대비 271% 증가한 5억 5,600만 달러를 기록했습니다.
총 플랫폼 자산은 전년 대비 119% 증가한 3,330억 달러를 달성했습니다.

watchItems.text: 10월부터 시작된 주식, 옵션, 예측 시장 및 선물 거래량의 기록적인 흐름이 4분기 전체 실적에 미칠 영향.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q32025robinhoodexhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Robinhood Reports Third Quarter 2025 Results Revenues up 100% year-over-year to a record $1.27 billion Net Deposits were a record $20 billion, and Robinhood Gold Subscribers reached a record 3.9 million Diluted EPS up 259% year-over-year to $0.61 Robinhood now up to 11 business lines each generating ~$100 million or more in annualized revenues MENLO PARK, Calif. – November 5, 2025 – Robinhood Markets, Inc. (“Robinhood”) (NASDAQ: HOOD) today announced financial results for the third quarter of 2025, which ended September 30, 2025. "Our team’s relentless product velocity drove record business results in Q3 and we’re not slowing down— Prediction Markets are growing rapidly, Robinhood Banking is starting to roll out, and Robinhood Ventures is coming,”  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.27 billion = 12억 7,000만 달러; $20 billion = 200억 달러; 3.9 million = 390만 달러; $100 million = 1억 달러; $1.27 = 1.27달러; $20 = 20달러; $0.61 = 0.61달러; $100 = 100달러.

fitable growth, and we continued to diversify our business, adding two more business lines—Prediction Markets and Bitstamp—that are generating approximately $100 million or more in annualized revenues,” said Jason Warnick, Chief Financial Officer of Robinhood . “And Q4 is off to a strong start in October, with record monthly trading volumes across equities, options, prediction markets, and futures, and new highs for margin balances.” Third Quarter Results • Total net revenues increased 100% year-over-year to $1.27 billion. ◦ Transaction-based revenues increased 129% year-over-year to $730 million, primarily driven by cryptocurrencies revenue of $268 million, up over 300% ,  Normalized numeric aliases: $100 million = 1억 달러; $1.27 billion = 12억 7,000만 달러; $730 million = 7억 3,000만 달러; $268 million = 2억 6,800만 달러; $304 million = 3억 400만 달러; $86 million = 8,600만 달러; $456 million = 4억 5,600만 달러; $100 = 100달러; $730 = 730달러; $1.27 = 1.27달러; $268 = 268달러; $304 = 304달러; $86 = 86달러; $456 = 456달러.

curities lending activity , partially offset by lower short-term interest rates. ◦ Other revenues increased 100% year-over-year to $88 million, primarily due to increased Robinhood Gold subscribers. • Net income increased 271% year-over-year to $556 million. • Diluted earnings per share (“EPS”) increased 259% year-over-year to $0.61. • Total operating expenses increased 31% year-over-year to $639 million. The year-over-year increase was primarily driven by marketing and growth investments, and acquisition-related expenses. ◦ Adjusted Operating Expenses and Share-Based Compensation (“SBC”) (non-GAAP) increased 29% year-over-year to $613 million. • Adjusted EBITDA (no  Normalized numeric aliases: $88 million = 8,800만 달러; $556 million = 5억 5,600만 달러; $639 million = 6억 3,900만 달러; $613 million = 6억 1,300만 달러; $742 million = 7억 4,200만 달러; 2.5 million = 250만 달러; 26.8 million = 2,680만 달러; 2.8 million = 280만 달러; $88 = 88달러; $742 = 742달러; $556 = 556달러; $0.61 = 0.61달러; $639 = 639달러; $613 = 613달러.

. • Total Platform Assets increased 119% year-over-year to $333 billion, driven by continued Net Deposits, higher equity and cryptocurrency valuations, and acquired assets. • Net Deposits were $20.4 billion, an annualized growth rate of 29% relative to Total Platform Assets at the end of Q2 2025. Over the past twelve months, Net Deposits were $68.3 billion, a growth rate of 45% relative to Total Platform Assets at the end of Q3 2024. • Robinhood Gold Subscribers increased by 1.7 million, or 77%, year-over-year to 3.9 million. • Average Revenue Per User (“ARPU”) increased 82% year-over-year to $191. • Cash and cash equivalents totaled $4.3 billion compared with $  Normalized numeric aliases: $333 billion = 3,330억 달러; $20.4 billion = 204억 달러; $68.3 billion = 683억 달러; 1.7 million = 170만 달러; 3.9 million = 390만 달러; $4.3 billion = 43억 달러; $4.6 billion = 46억 달러; $107 million = 1억 700만 달러; $333 = 333달러; $4.6 = 4.6달러; $68.3 = 68.3달러; $191 = 191달러; $4.3 = 4.3달러; $107 = 107달러; $104.95 = 104.95달러.
